race.comment: SAFEDEEL (13) has been impressive in his past couple when leading, scoring by 1.8L at Bunbury last time out. He's a nice gelding on the rise and he made a big ratings jump when scoring last time out. He looks right up to this on that effort and while this is a strong race, he fits right in. RALLY THE TROOPS (4) gets Pike now and a much better barrier after finishing strongly last time out, beaten 1.2L. He maps for a much better run this time around and his performances here recently stack right up. Can make an impression once again. YOUGIVEMECHILLS (9) continued his winning run last time out with a 0.3L victory in a very similar race last time out. He may end up back in the run, but he's shown plenty of class to mow his rivals down in recent efforts. Can extend his winning run. DESERT WAVES (11) is another who continues to raise the bar and has plenty of upside. He won't be far away. AZENA (1) can win again without surprising.
